buttons.text: 新建会话 通过命令面板启动新的流程或任务。
恢复上次工作 Studio Alpha bootstrap · 2 min ago
↗ Shift+T 查看 Focused Slot Trace Move the shell into trace-first posture for the current focused slot.
▣ 动作入口 进入 Review Deck Bias the shell toward window intents, placeholders, and review posture.
◎ Shift+I 检查 Boundary Contract Focus the right rail on boundary state and keep dock context visible.
↺ 动作入口 恢复最近工作区 Studio Alpha bootstrap · openclaw-studio
● 动作入口 打开命令面板 打开命令面板并启动新的流程或任务。
